page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Theatrical Edition - DEATH chapter
text:
is an artbook of the Neon Genesis Evangelion Film Books for Evangelion: DEATH film. It was written by Newtype Editorial Department and published by Kadokawa Shoten on 10 July 1997. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4048528351
